channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 23.5%.

item.title: i Politics: Green Party insiders privately concede they can't beat Burnham
item.description: Green Party insiders privately concede they can't beat Burnham

item.title: FT UK Politics: Leaving ECHR would jeopardise UK national security, say centrist Tories
item.description: Leaving ECHR would jeopardise UK national security, say centrist Tories

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting likens social media to tobacco as pressure grows for under-16s ban
item.description: Streeting likens social media to tobacco as pressure grows for under-16s ban

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Carney warns Alberta independence vote from Canada could echo Brexit as a 'dangerous bluff'
item.description: Carney warns Alberta independence vote from Canada could echo Brexit as a 'dangerous bluff'

item.title: FT UK Politics: Carney warns Alberta separatists of Brexit-style regret
item.description: Carney warns Alberta separatists of Brexit-style regret

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting urges social media ban for under-16s
item.description: Streeting urges social media ban for under-16s

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Rachel Reeves tells ministers to ‘buy British’ in four key industries
item.description: Rachel Reeves tells ministers to ‘buy British’ in four key industries

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer will still face leadership contest if Burnham loses by-election, Jess Phillips says
item.description: Starmer will still face leadership contest if Burnham loses by-election, Jess Phillips says

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Elon Musk retweet signals rightwing split that could help Andy Burnham in Makerfield
item.description: Elon Musk retweet signals rightwing split that could help Andy Burnham in Makerfield

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour has never had a female leader as ‘it’s a bit sexist’, says Jess Phillips
item.description: Labour has never had a female leader as ‘it’s a bit sexist’, says Jess Phillips
